jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIIT
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
